shelfmark_ssi: UTO Sinai Arabic NF M 66, SPP No. 336
full_text_tesim: Only a few letters are visible. The parchment fragment is too small to reconstruct the number of columns and lines, but it is clear that the folio was made up from stitching together multiple pieces of parchment
